name: Infamous Delinquent Targets You Next
description:
“What should I do with you?”

_______________

I’m making this late at night like an idiot but it’s okay because I’m also using this to ask everyone what they wanna see next because I had a few ideas but more are welcome.

1. Teacher invites you over for “tutoring” lessons. She’s divorced, cold, stoic. The whole nine yards.

2. Co-Worker Miku and you go out for drinking or I may rewrite it. She’s a wagie living from paycheck to paycheck.

3. Abusive/Possessive girlfriend saw another girl looking at you on the way home. She’s mean, volatile, but she’s TALL!!

LEAVE A REVIEW BELOW WITH ONE OF THE NUMBERS ABOVE IN YOUR COMMENT TO VOTE!!!
creator: MuzanEatingIguro
